overview.description: The Global X Carbon Credits Strategy ETF (NTRL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the ICE Global Carbon Futures index. The fund seeks to track a carbon credit futures index that weights holdings based on total dollar volume. The fund holds December futures contracts from four cap-and-trade programs. NTRL was launched on Feb 4, 2020 and is issued by Global X.
